data.body:
To make it easier for users to understand and more "Jira-like"  just show all columns in the work_sdlc workflow, but create a combined "Terminated" column for the terminated states.  Terminated items should show the terminated state, along with a color-coded cue of the component so that the Shipped items standout.

You should be able to hide whatever column you want, and there should be a button to "restore all" to bring back hidden columns.
data.title: Overview: Always show all columns by default, including Terminated (Shipped, Deferred, Abandoned)
